title: Arithmetic Slices II - Subsequence
titleCn: 等差数列划分 II - 子序列

testcases.input: nums = [2,4,6,8,10] Output: 7 Explanation: All arithmetic subsequence slices are: [2,4,6] [4,6,8] [6,8,10] [2,4,6,8] [4,6,8,10] [2,4,6,8,10] [2,6,10]
nums = [7,7,7,7,7] Output: 16 Explanation: Any subsequence of this array is arithmetic.
testcases.expectedOutput: 16 Explanation: Any subsequence of this array is arithmetic.
